import list

value MinMax
  min: Int
  max: Int
end

fn min_max(_ xs: List<Int>) -> MinMax
  let mn = match list.min(xs)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("empty list")
  end
  let mx = match list.max(xs)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("empty list")
  end
  MinMax(min: mn, max: mx)
end

let result = min_max([5, 1, 9, 3, 7, 2])
print("min=#{result.min}")
print("max=#{result.max}")
